output 2d{0, 1000, 1000, 2000, 2000, 1, 1001, 1001, 1001, 2, 2, 1002}+1d{0, 1000, 1000, 2000, 1, 1, 1001, 2}-3d{0, 1000, 2000, 1, 1, 1, 2, 1001} >= 1002 named "2 armas, sin defensa"

output 2d{0, 1000, 1000, 2000, 2000, 1, 1001, 1001, 1001, 2, 2, 1002}+1d{0, 1000, 1000, 2000, 1, 1, 1001, 2}-4d{0, 1000, 2000, 1, 1, 1, 2, 1001} >= 1002 named "2 armas, defensa 1"
